questions.question_text: CO Define national income. 1 What is the difference between personal income and personal disposable income. 1 Explain MPS and MPC. 2 What is balanced budget multiplier? 2

CO What are the major limitations of GDP concept? Explain in brief. 1 Explain how the interest rate is determined in the classical theory. 1 Explain the aggregate production function as per the classical theory of output and employment 1

CO Explain the condition for equilibrium in the simple Keynesian model in terms of the components of aggregate demand. 2 Briefly explain the conditions for Equilibrium Output under Simple Keynesian Model. 2 Explain the effect on equilibrium income due to a change in autonomous investment demand, as per Keynesian model. 2 Note: Q. 1 is compulsory. Subject: Macro Economics Subject Code: BMS 106
